sanskrit:
एतां दृष्टिमवष्टभ्य नष्टात्मानोऽल्पबुद्धयः।
प्रभवन्त्युग्रकर्माणः क्षयाय जगतोऽहिताः॥
transliteration: etāṃ dṛṣṭim avaṣṭabhya naṣṭātmāno 'lpa-buddhayaḥ | prabhavanty ugra-karmāṇaḥ kṣayāya jagato 'hitāḥ ||
literal_meaning: Accepting this vision, the lost-selves of little intelligence flourish in fierce actions for the destruction of the world, unbeneficial to all.
contextual_meaning: When a person internalizes a nihilistic, material-only worldview, the sense of inner emptiness (naṣṭātmā) is covered by grandiose, destructive projects that feel powerful but actually externalize self-hatred onto the planet and its beings.
psychological_state: Narcissistic armor against existential dread; compulsive productivity as defense against feeling void; dissociation from empathic linkage with living systems.
trigger_scenario: A tech entrepreneur works 90-hour weeks to scale an AI-weapons startup, justifying it as "inevitable progress" while ignoring nightmares and estranged children.
anchor_text: Choose meaning over destruction; your life shapes the world.
